_instructions.purpose: Copy this file to workers/[WORKER_ID]/MANIFEST.json. Fill every _value field. Remove all _instruction blocks before use.
_instructions.naming: Worker ID must be 2-6 uppercase letters. e.g. DC, ORCH, BOT, QA
_instructions.ref_code: Get this from DC Agent BEFORE creating the worker folder

ref_code._instruction: Issued by DC Agent. Format: [PROJECT]-[ORIG]-JSON-[SEQ5]. e.g. BRM-DC-JSON-00001

worker_id._instruction: 2-6 uppercase letters. Unique across all workers. e.g. DC, ORCH, BOT

worker_name._instruction: Human-readable full name. e.g. Document Control Agent

version._instruction: Current version. Match the GitHub tag for this worker.

project._instruction: Which project this worker serves. One of: BRM, JESS, TALE, PIG, SYS

description._instruction: One sentence. What does this worker do? Used for duplicate detection.

function_code._instruction: Controlled vocabulary code from doc_register function_codes table. Must exist in registry before use.

own_paths._instruction: All paths this worker owns. Relative to the tasks/ root on the QNAP.

naming_convention._instruction: Replace [WORKER_ID] with actual worker ID. Do not change the structure.

input_schema._instruction: List ALL required fields. Any field not here causes NEEDS_INFO response.

payload_required_by_action._instruction: For each action this worker handles, list the payload fields it needs.

actions_handled._instruction: List every action this worker can respond to.

fail_behaviour._instruction: What happens on failure. RETURN_TO_SENDER sends NEEDS_INFO back to caller.
